hooks.command: git fetch -q origin main 2>/dev/null; LOCAL=$(git rev-parse @ 2>/dev/null); REMOTE=$(git rev-parse origin/main 2>/dev/null); echo '--- GIT SYNK ---'; if [ -n "$REMOTE" ] && [ "$LOCAL" != "$REMOTE" ]; then BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count @..origin/main 2>/dev/null); AHEAD=$(git rev-list --count origin/main..@ 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$BEHIND" ] && BEHIND=0; [ -z "$AHEAD" ] && AHEAD=0; DIRTY=$(git status --porcelain --untracked-files=no); if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ] && [ "$AHEAD" = 0 ] && [ -z "$DIRTY" ]; then git pull --rebase -q origin main 2>/dev/null && echo "Auto-synkad: hämtade $BEHIND nya commits från origin/main." || echo "VARNING: auto-synk misslyckades — kör: git pull --rebase origin main"; elif [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ] && [ -n "$DIRTY" ]; then echo "VARNING: $BEHIND commits efter origin/main men osparade ändringar finns — committa/stasha och kör: git pull --rebase origin main"; elif [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then echo "VARNING: lokalt och origin/main har divergerat (lokala $AHEAD, fjärr $BEHIND) — kör: git pull --rebase origin main"; else echo 'Synk: lokalt är före origin/main (opushade commits).'; fi; else echo 'Synk: lokalt är i nivå med origin/main.'; fi; echo '--- GIT STATUS ---' && git branch --show-current && git status --short && echo '--- SENASTE COMMIT ---' && git log -1 --oneline && echo '--- INSTRUKTION ---' && echo 'Visa dashboarden från CLAUDE.md för användaren. Inkludera git-infon ovan.'
echo '--- TODO ---' && echo 'PÅMINNELSE: Skapa en todo-lista (TodoWrite) i början av sessionen så snart användarens uppgift har mer än ett steg, och håll den uppdaterad medan du arbetar.'

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *recipes.json) echo 'Blockerad: recipes.json är skyddad. Be användaren om explicit tillåtelse först.' >&2; exit 2;; *) exit 0;; esac

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms') | Out-Null; [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude väntar på dig','Claude Code')"

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *.js) node --check "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo "Syntax OK: $FILE" || echo "SYNTAXFEL i $FILE — åtgärda innan push" >&2;; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *shopping-builder.js|*willys-matcher.js) node tests/match.test.js >&2 || { echo 'BLOCKERAD: match-regressiontester failade — kör node tests/match.test.js för detaljer.' >&2; exit 2; };; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *shopping-builder.js|*willys-matcher.js|*willys-search.js) node tests/match-corpus.test.js >&2 || { echo 'BLOCKERAD: korpus-regressiontester failade — kör node tests/match-corpus.test.js för detaljer.' >&2; exit 2; };; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *shopping-builder.js) node tests/shopping.test.js >&2 || { echo 'BLOCKERAD: shopping-regressiontester failade — kör node tests/shopping.test.js för detaljer.' >&2; exit 2; };; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *generate.js) node tests/select-recipes.test.js >&2 || { echo 'BLOCKERAD: select-recipes-regressiontester failade — kör node tests/select-recipes.test.js för detaljer.' >&2; exit 2; };; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *dispatch-to-willys.js|*willys-search.js|*willys-cart-client.js|*dispatch-matcher.js|*willys-matcher.js) node tests/dispatch-to-willys.test.js >&2 || { echo 'BLOCKERAD: dispatch-regressiontester failade — kör node tests/dispatch-to-willys.test.js för detaljer.' >&2; exit 2; };; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *dispatch-to-willys.js|*secrets-store.js) node tests/cookies-endpoint.test.js >&2 || { echo 'BLOCKERAD: cookies-endpoint-regressiontester failade — kör node tests/cookies-endpoint.test.js för detaljer.' >&2; exit 2; };; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *data-mapper.js) node tests/data-mapper.test.js >&2 || { echo 'BLOCKERAD: data-mapper-regressiontester failade — kör node tests/data-mapper.test.js för detaljer.' >&2; exit 2; };; esac; exit 0

CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^??'); if [ -n "$CHANGES" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Påminnelse: Det finns osparade git-ändringar. Committa och pusha till main om arbetet är klart."}'; fi
